title: Pre-populate backend with sample menu items

requirements.text: Pre-populate the backend with a set of sample menu items covering multiple categories (e.g., Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks) so that the Menu page displays real content out of the box. Each item should have a name, description, price, category, and availability set to true.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 8–12 sample menu items are seeded in the backend actor, spread across at least 3 distinct categories.
Each item has a non-empty name, description, price greater than 0, a valid category string, and availability set to true.
The public Menu page displays all seeded items grouped by their category without any manual admin action.
Seeded items are visible in the Admin Dashboard's Menu Management section and can be edited or toggled.

constraints: Do not alter the existing MenuItem data model or any other backend data structures.
Seeding must occur inside the existing single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo — no new files or actors.
Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Adding new menu categories or changing the category taxonomy beyond what is already supported.
Changing the frontend Menu page layout or design.
Adding customer-facing ordering or checkout functionality.
Implementing staff authentication or role changes.
